security.csp: default-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:11434 http://127.0.0.1:11435 http://127.0.0.1:39012; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://icons.duckduckgo.com; media-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'self' blob:

bundle.shortDescription: A minimalist, privacy-first, local-AI browser + developer tools.
bundle.longDescription: Diatom is a browser built on the principle of digital sovereignty. No accounts, no cloud, no telemetry. Integrated developer tools powered by Zed's editor core. All computation stays on your device.
